name: retrato
description: Perfect balanced Photo Album javascript plugin

scripts.build:lib: mkdir -p retrato/album/static/js/lib && copyfiles -f node_modules/headroom.js/dist/headroom.js retrato/album/static/js/lib/ && copyfiles -f node_modules/jquery-touch-events/index.js retrato/album/static/js/lib/ && mv retrato/album/static/js/lib/index.js retrato/album/static/js/lib/jquery-touch-events.js && copyfiles -f node_modules/jquery/dist/jquery.js retrato/album/static/js/lib/ && copyfiles -f node_modules/mustache/mustache.js retrato/album/static/js/lib/ && mv retrato/album/static/js/lib/mustache.js retrato/album/static/js/lib/mustache.js.js && copyfiles -f node_modules/watchjs/src/watch.js retrato/album/static/js/lib/ && copyfiles -f node_modules/retrato-js/dist/retrato-js.js retrato/album/static/js/lib/
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:lib

author: Ricardo Paiva
